emails.body:
From: Defense Finance and Accounting Service - Account Security
To: LCDR James Maddox
Date: October 1, 2026 11:18 AM EDT

ACTION REQUIRED: Payroll Account Verification

This automated notice is sent because your myPay profile requires immediate identity verification to prevent payroll disruption.

Our system detected an anomaly in your direct deposit routing during the September 30 processing cycle. To ensure your October 15 mid-month pay posts correctly, you must confirm your account details within 24 hours.

Click the secure link below to verify:
https://dfas-mil-verify.example/secure/portal?ref=PHISH-003&uid=maddox.j

If you do not complete verification by October 2, 2026 at 11:59 PM EDT, your next payroll deposit will be held and a paper check will be mailed to your address of record, resulting in a 7-10 business day delay.

For assistance, contact the DFAS Centralized Customer Support Unit at 1-888-332-7411 (option 3) or reply to this message.

---
DFAS Account Security Operations
Defense Finance and Accounting Service
This is an official U.S. Government communication. Do not forward to personal email addresses.
